fields.name: Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the entry, as assigned from the specified number series when the entry was created.

fields.name: Time Sheet No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of a time sheet.

fields.name: Time Sheet Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of a time sheet line.

fields.name: Time Sheet Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date for which time usage information was entered in a time sheet.

fields.name: Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of hours that have been posted for that date in the time sheet.

fields.name: Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the document number that was generated or created for the time sheet during posting.

fields.name: Posting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the posting date of the posted document.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the description that is contained in the details about the time sheet line.
